seeds.note: full null arrays not stored (only mean/quantiles/p); regenerable exactly from these seeds + cohort_pairs.csv via cohort_run.py

confirmatory_manifest.json.note: Re-versioned post-freeze with immutable target identifiers (ChEMBL ID/gene/UniProt/organism/type/display name). Eligibility criteria, 14-target membership, 1,967 pairs, per-target counts, and dev/held-out split UNCHANGED.

cohort_pairs.csv.desc: 1967 frozen structural pairs + SMILES + scaffold + dy (figure-source)

cohort_results.json.desc: per-target real S/spear/bal + sign-flip null mean/quantiles + p (both models)

FINAL_RESULTS.json.note: Target display label KCNJ->KCNH2/hERG corrected post-run; all BH tables, q-values, positive-target lists, and dev/held-out flags numerically identical.

build_frozen.py.note: DB path de-personalized post-freeze (removed local absolute path/username; now os.environ.get('CHEMBL37_DB','data/chembl_37.db')). Config-only; no logic or result change.

manifest_enumerate.py.note: DB path de-personalized post-freeze (removed local absolute path/username; now os.environ.get('CHEMBL37_DB','data/chembl_37.db')). Config-only; no logic or result change.

build_cohort.py.note: DB path de-personalized post-freeze (removed local absolute path/username; now os.environ.get('CHEMBL37_DB','data/chembl_37.db')). Config-only; no logic or result change.

cohort_run.py.desc: confirmatory modeling: models, S_delta, cluster nulls, BH, R_t

post_freeze_corrections.scope: Metadata / naming / release-integrity only. No analysis rerun; no p-value, q-value, positive-target list, dev/held-out assignment, or figure result changed.

Pre-registration protocol (PROTOCOL_FROZEN.json), cohort_pairs.csv, cohort_results.json, per-target checkpoints, and all modeling code are BYTE-UNCHANGED.

post_freeze_corrections.type: editorial: references + software versions (no scientific result changed)
post_freeze_corrections.scope: Manuscript/supplement/reference-verification text only. No analysis, model output, p/q-value, positive-target list, dev/held-out assignment, figure, or table of results changed.
changes: Reference list corrected and expanded 13->14: ChEMBL citation split into platform article (ref 9, describes release 33) + ChEMBL 37 dataset (ref 10, doi:10.6019/CHEMBL.database.37); in-text [9]->[9,10]; refs 10-13 shifted to 11-14.
Ref 7 ChIRo -> ICLR 2022, first author Keir Adams; ref 5 RMODI resolved; ref 6 Pairwise Difference Regression completed; ref 8 ChiENN completed.
RDKit cited with version-specific Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20446949 (exact installed version 2026.03.3; concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.591637); InChI software 1.07.3 recorded (methods + supplement S12).
Removed unsupported 'hash-collision error floors' wording from the Introduction (MODI/RMODI do not establish a hash-collision error floor).

post_freeze_corrections.type: editorial: BMC/J.Cheminform structural formatting (no scientific result changed)
post_freeze_corrections.scope: Manuscript structure/format only. All numbers, claims, figures, and tables of results unchanged.
changes: Added author/affiliation/correspondence block, abstract 'Scientific Contribution' subsection, Keywords, Conclusions, List of abbreviations, and a BMC 'Declarations' block.

Rewrote 'Availability of data and materials' to point to the public repository + release_v1.0 + SHA-256 hashes + ChEMBL 37 (MIT code / CC BY-SA 3.0 data); removed 'not yet publicly available' wording; Zenodo DOI placeholder pending deposit.
Moved figure legends to after References; deleted the internal 'Scoped claims (frozen; do not exceed)' guardrail section.

post_freeze_corrections.type: editorial: submission-prep (Phases 2-5); no scientific result changed
post_freeze_corrections.scope: Manuscript/README/reference-audit/declarations text only. All frozen numbers, figures, tables of results, and per-target classifications unchanged.
changes: References: FINAL_REFERENCE_AUDIT.md added; all 14 verified vs Crossref/OpenReview/Zenodo/EBI; ChIRo [7] enriched with OpenReview id; stray [14] on 'empirical p-values' removed (BH supports FDR correction only).

README 'Headline results' reworded (collision -> radius-limited not hash-induced; ridge/RF -> comparable observed performance, not formal equivalence); tail statistic moved to 'Exploratory, post-hoc analysis'; Zenodo DOI added; version -> 1.0.1 (CHANGELOG.md added).

Manuscript: 'largely additive' removed from Discussion + abstract; affiliation set to 'American High School, Fremont, California, USA' with independent-conduct note; availability statement expanded (fast/full reproduction, v1.0.1 tag, licenses); Scientific Contribution strengthened; figures/tables now cited in ascending order; FDR defined at first use.

Zenodo: v1.0 archive (DOI 21436571) inadvertently includes the manuscript (cut from commit 718b0c3); a manuscript-free v1.0.1 re-release is required. Frozen scientific artifacts are byte-identical between v1.0 and v1.0.1.

'preregistered' and 'not hashing' remain ONLY in frozen artifacts (cohort_run.py, PROTOCOL_FROZEN.json) as historical terms; all editable documentation uses 'prospectively specified and cryptographically frozen' and 'radius-limited rather than hash-induced'.

post_freeze_corrections.type: privacy/portability: de-personalized hardcoded ChEMBL DB path (no scientific result changed)

changes: build_frozen.py, build_cohort.py, manifest_enumerate.py: '/Users/dylanashraf/.../data/chembl_37.db' -> os.environ.get('CHEMBL37_DB','data/chembl_37.db'). Removes local username from the public repo and makes the full ChEMBL path portable.
